impacts.statement: A large portion of the town of Chunky is inundated.
Water begins to affect residents south of Chunky.
A large area of mostly agricultural and forest land on both sides of the river are inundated from 26 to 31 feet.
Water begins to approach Boyettes Fish Camp.
Considerable areas of pastureland south of the river gage begin to flood.

dataAttribution.title: Observations courtesy of U.S. Geological Survey

hydronotes.statement: River forecasts for this location take into account past precipitation and the precipitation amounts expected approximately 24 hours into the future from the forecast issuance time.
